role: Founder of Freedom Movement of Iran; Prime Minister of interim government (1979)
bio: Engineer, academic, and political leader. First secretary-general of the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran) (1961–1995). Co-founded the movement alongside [Mahmoud Taleghani](/people/mahmoud-taleghani) and [Yadollah Sahabi](/people/yadollah-sahabi) as a religiously oriented offshoot of the [National Front](/orgs/national-front-iran). Appointed by [Ruhollah Khomeini](/people/ruhollah-khomeini) as head of the provisional government after the [1979 revolution](/events/iranian-revolution-1979). Resigned on 5 November 1979 after the [US embassy seizure](/events/iran-hostage-crisis-1979), declaring he could not govern while revolutionary bodies operated outside his authority. Served in parliament (Majlis) 1980–1984. Died 20 January 1995.
editorial_notes: First PM of the Islamic Republic. Resigned over hostage crisis. Died 1995.
